creator: kirgudu@corbina.net
text:
HP server raid with CISS driver can't see partition more then 2Tb. Error on the boot and disk more 2Tb doesn't detect by kernel.

Fix: 

create massives 2Tb and use zfs and other software raid.
How-To-Repeat: Create disk massive more 2Tb. Boot FreeBSD from CD and see error.
